# SiemAuditExportJobComponent

Compound op job: pull audit logs from a SaaS source, normalize to OCSF/ECS, ship to a SIEM — all in one YAML config.

## Dependencies
- `pandas`
- `requests`

## What this is
A **Dagster job** (no asset materialized) — the component installs a `dg.job`
plus an optional schedule. Lineage graph stays clean; the work happens
behind the scenes.

## See also
- [Schema](schema.json) · [Example config](example.yaml)

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `job_name` | `str` | Dagster job name |
| `source` | `str` | okta \| aws_cloudtrail \| github \| azure_activity \| slack \| auth0 \| snowflake \| generic_http |
| `sink` | `str` | splunk \| sentinel \| datadog_logs \| sumo_logic \| elastic \| qradar \| chronicle \| s3 |

### Sensor configuration

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `default_status` | `str` | `"STOPPED"` | STOPPED \| RUNNING |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `source_config` | `dict` | `dict()` | Source-specific config (see README) |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `schedule` | `str` | — | Cron schedule (e.g. '*/15 * * * *') — None = no schedule |
| `lookback_minutes` | `int` | `15` | How far back to fetch on each run |
| `normalize_to` | `str` | `"ocsf"` | ocsf \| ecs \| none |
| `sink_config` | `dict` | `dict()` | Sink-specific config (see README) |
| `fail_on_zero_events` | `bool` | `false` | Fail the job when 0 events were returned |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->
